calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Taquishka Turner, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc.
Witness, Harold Dawson II, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Jayrick Walker.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 440 Eddy Street, Room 310, San Francisco, California 94109 San Francisco.

Damages $0
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
for a Total Judgment of $0

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Paul Renne; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by.
Attorney Kaquishka Turner for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jayrick Walker IS NOT PRESENT.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of OCT-03-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
